query: SELECT p.id as produto_id, p.name as produto_nome, cg.id as grupo_id, cg.name as grupo_nome, cg.minQuantity as min_qtd, cg.maxQuantity as max_qtd, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complements c WHERE c.groupId = cg.id) as total_itens FROM products p LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 AND p.name = 'PIZZA TREM (3 Partes Salgadas e 1 Doce)' ORDER BY cg.sortOrder, cg.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id as produto_id, p.name as produto_nome, cg.id as grupo_id, cg.name as grupo_nome, cg.minQuantity as min_qtd, cg.maxQuantity as max_qtd, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complements c WHERE c.groupId = cg.id) as total_itens FROM products p LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 AND p.name = 'PIZZA TREM (3 Partes Salgadas e 1 Doce)' ORDER BY cg.sortOrder, cg.id;
